text.message: I suspect you might desire wheat but were you going to go 6 2 to that effect?
yep that was one of them
I did not expect your placements red, a novel approach
A high delta strategy can be profitable
Risky play orange, you like to live dangerously
didnt you just solo me lol
the table changed since I solo'd you to say the least
you just did it for vengeance
Orange looking too strong for my feeble position
unless blue gets real lucky with devs
Orange has teed it up nicely, there's no doubt
